Localization.Description: A virtual machine is imported or exported

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Virtual machine "{object.name}" is imported on host {event_src.host}
Failed to export virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is being exported on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is being imported on host {event_src.host}
Failed to import virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is exported on host {event_src.host}
